title: How Simple Actually Blew Up With Faceless YouTube Strategy

transcript.text: Our first YouTube channel, Simple Actually, generated $58,000 from 100 videos. Their best video, How to Sleep Less and [music] uh Wake Up Fresh, hit 2.8 million views, and the formula here is very straightforward. [music] They take something that feels hard, like sleep, studying, chemistry, and reframe it as this [music] is simple, actually. And the production itself is literal stick figures on a whiteboard. A team member that can create those videos will cost you less than 800 bucks a month. Now, it's super easy to bend this format. You can run a channel like >> [music] >> Money Is Simple, Actually, bending it towards finance. Uh Cooking Is Simple, bending it towards food. And also, Social Skills Are Simple, Actually. This channel will be [music] bent towards psychology. Each one of these is a fresh angle that nobody else is using yet.
